title: A Risk-Based Audit Trail Review
alt: Four-step risk-based approach to GMP audit trail review

items.label: Inventory & classify systems
items.desc: List GMP systems; rank each by data integrity risk.

items.label: Define what, who, how often
items.desc: Set events reviewed, reviewer and frequency per system.

items.label: Independent & competent review
items.desc: Reviewer is separate from data creator and knows the system.

items.label: Document, escalate & act
items.desc: Record outcome; escalate anomalies via deviation and CAPA.
